item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Succulent pork neck with penne pasta tossed in creamyherb sauce with fresh herbs, topped with crispy salad in vinaigrette

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Thai Red Curry with chicken and vegetables, withJasmine rice/brown rice and topped with toasted sesame/coconut mix and parsley.Hereto lime and cilantro on the side Green dish: Thai Red Curry with tofu and vegetables, with Jasminerice/brown rice and topped with toasted sesame/coconut mix and parsley. Heretolime and cilantro on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Chicken curry with fresh vegetables, gently simmered in creamy coconut milk andwarm spices. Served with steamed rice GREEN DISH: Tempeh curry with fresh vegetables, slowly simmered in creamy coconut milk andspices. Served with rice

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Rich ragout of turkey and chorizo, slow cooked for depth and warmth, servedwith creamy polenta and fresh salsa verde GREEN DISH: Chickpea and plant protein ragout, gently simmered for full flavour, servedwith creamy polenta and fresh salsa verde

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Aromatic North African tagine filled with eggplants,chickpeas made with juicy turkey served with potatoes, chili and apricotchutney on the side Green dish: Aromatic North African tagine filled with eggplants,chickpeas made with tofu served with potatoes, chili and apricot chutney on theside
